name: DONALDSON Co INC
summary: The Company Founded in 1915, Donaldson Company, Inc. (the Company or Donaldson) is a global leader in technology-led filtration products and solutions, serving a broad range of industries and advanced markets. Donaldsons diverse and skilled employees at more than 150 locations on six continents, 77 of which are manufacturing and/or distribution centers, partner with customers from small business owners to the worlds largest original equipment manufacturer (OEM) brands to solve complex filtration...
